<!--
  PR title MUST follow Conventional Commits, e.g. `feat(web): add login page`.
  Allowed scopes: web, ui, core, db, auth, i18n, eslint-config,
  typescript-config, tooling, config, deps, ci, docs, release, repo.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] ✨ feat — new feature
- [ ] 🐛 fix — bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] 📝 docs
- [ ] ✅ test
- [ ] 🔧 chore / build / ci

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (lint, typecheck, test, build, spellcheck, format)
- [ ] Conventional commits (no `Co-Authored-By` trailers)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where relevant
- [ ] Added/updated French messages (`messages/fr.json`) if UI text changed
- [ ] Database changes include a committed migration (`drizzle/`)
